_doc: FROZEN GOLDEN — captured 2026-06-11 from the live ADRKind class (pre-deletion), F3 lote-2. Deep-equaled against the descriptor-synthesized port in test_lote2_descriptor_equivalence.py.

identity.docs: An ADR captures ONE architectural decision with its context, rationale, and consequences. Convention: one ADR per file, immutable once accepted (subsequent decisions supersede). Follows Nygard / MADR template — Adopt on ThoughtWorks Tech Radar. Studio renders these as the decision log of the project; PMs/architects can scan rationale without reading code.

alternatives_considered.description: Other options weighed and rejected, with brief why-not.

body.description: Optional full markdown body (ADR.md). When present, takes precedence over the structured fields above for rendering. Useful when the ADR predates this schema.

consequences.description: What follows from this decision — positive AND negative. Future readers need to see the trade-offs, not just the wins.

context.description: WHY we needed to decide. What forces are in play? What constraints (technical, business, team) shape the choice? 1-3 paragraphs.

deciders.description: Actor names who participated in the decision.

decision.description: WHAT we decided. Active voice: 'We will X' or 'We chose X over Y'. 1-2 paragraphs.

narrative_origin.description: When extracted from a Narrative.decisions[] entry during Phase 2.2 migration, this points to the source Narrative slug for provenance.

status.description: Lifecycle: proposed → accepted → deprecated|superseded. Use `superseded` (not deprecated) when a newer ADR replaces this one — link via `superseded_by`.

superseded_by.description: ADR slug that supersedes this one (when status=superseded).

title.description: Decision headline — start with imperative verb.

out.consequences: One source of truth; parse gains schema validation.
out.context: Twin Py+TS classes duplicate every record kind; drift accumulates.
out.decision: We will express builtin record kinds as kinds/*.kind.yaml descriptors.
out.title: Adopt descriptor-first record kinds

spec.consequences: One source of truth; parse gains schema validation.
spec.context: Twin Py+TS classes duplicate every record kind; drift accumulates.
spec.decision: We will express builtin record kinds as kinds/*.kind.yaml descriptors.
spec.title: Adopt descriptor-first record kinds
